app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.41 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for stronger playback recovery, better episode matching, cleaner server choices, and smoother stream startup.
releaseNotes: Improved main playback matching for TV episodes that previously returned empty results
Added another main playback route to reduce load and improve fallback coverage
Improved stream headers used by protected playback links
Improved server quality labels and ordering
Improved recovery when a returned stream is expired or unavailable
Kept the original splash animation clean
Fixed phone Manage Profiles opening the wrong screen
Improved TV profile, banner, and focus stability
Improved player loading and error actions on TV
Cleaned quota warning text so raw JSON is never shown
Replaced hardcoded version text with the installed app version

items.title: The Cube 2.0.41
items.message: Playback matching, recovery, phone profile management, and TV stability were improved.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
